quoteLast: , observing several flags of     truce hung out in the town, I made the signal to cease firing,     and Lieutenant Willes pushed into the harbour with the boats,     when he was informed that the Commander had made his escape     with all the military.
title: Memoir of the Life and Services of Vice-Admiral Sir Jahleel Brenton, Baronet, K.C.B.
author: Raikes, Henry, 1782-1854 [Editor]
